title: Non-linear ground state representations and sharp Hardy inequalities
comment: AMSLaTeX, 22 pages; extension of the result to the case N<ps
summary:
We determine the sharp constant in the Hardy inequality for fractional
Sobolev spaces. To do so, we develop a non-linear and non-local version of the
ground state representation, which even yields a remainder term. From the sharp
Hardy inequality we deduce the sharp constant in a Sobolev embedding which is
optimal in the Lorentz scale. In the appendix, we characterize the cases of
equality in the rearrangement inequality in fractional Sobolev spaces.
